steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: At $x=0$, the model represents the year $2005$. The starting population is $15{,}000$, so the coefficient must be $15{,}000$.

steps.title: Identify the growth factor
steps.content:
An increase of $4\%$ each year means each year's population is multiplied by
+$$1+0.04=1.04$$

steps.title: Write the exponential model
steps.content: The model is +$$p=15{,}000(1.04)^x$$ +This has the correct initial value and the correct yearly growth factor. The answer is D.
